svg.title: Geofencing Flowchart 03 - Improved Allowed Access
svg.desc: Improved high-definition allowed-access geofencing SVG with clean convergence paths and centered text inside boxes.

text.tspan: Clean flow view: three approved access lanes converge into one policy engine before the protected website is served
PK IPs satisfy geography. MOFA + VPN and PK:UNO add
stronger route assurance. Every category remains
The allow action is still a policy decision based on
route category, identity confidence, and logged evidence.
